name: render
description: Generic render-handler registry (markdown / raw / data: json, xml, csv, tsv). Reuses the vendor.ts markdown-it singleton and the shiki highlighter so chat and this module never diverge on parser config; only post-render (raw toggle, data-normalizers) lives here. Sub-handlers for data formats normalize into markdown and call back into the markdown handler — single rendering head. Not yet wired into chat (intentional, see modules/render/README in plan); consumed via render(text, format, opts) or <RenderView/>.
